case_title: ABRAMS, KEITH R. VS LEGRAS, CHRISTOPHER D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABRAMS, KEITH R. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEGRAS, CHRISTOPHER D. $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $134.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,634.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

PLFT'S APPEARS & REPORTS DEFENDANT'S DEFAULT IN THE TERMS OF THE SETTLEMENT. THE COURT THEREFORE DENIES DEFT'S MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT.
